content.en:
"I'm sure I'm detached!"

The sun god will say.

The other gods didn't believe it either, after all, it was unlikely that a non-heaven-defying person at the level of a three-star late-stage god general would be able to transcend it.

At this moment, the sun god will pull out the long river of time and space, and the mighty river of time and space will spread to this area.

The sun god will try to pull out his soul imprint at first, but after his power enters the long river of time and space, it will be completely shattered, and it will not be able to shake the long river of time and space at all.

"Sure enough, you can't transcend it with your own strength!"

The sun god will murmur.

At this moment, a small golden tree appeared in his hand, and it was as if a small sun had been born on the tree.

"Go ahead!"

The little golden sun blasted into the long river of time and space, entered the depths of the long river of time and space, and found the soul mark of the sun god general.

In the next moment, the Sun God turned his soul imprint into a Sun God and Demon, and the terrifying power shook the long river of time and space, and the power far surpassed the previous vision of the Phantom Feather God who would be transcendent.

Rumble!!!

The sun god and demon tore through the long river of time and space, easily walked out of the long river of time and space, and fused with the sun god to merge himself.

The sun god will, detached!

The whole process is very clear, but not on oneself, but on external objects.

And as the sun god was about to transcend, the little golden tree shattered into countless pieces, turning into light and dissipating.

"Sun God General, this treasure of yours should be a treasure of some great power in the chaos, specially used for transcendence, the value is very precious, I am afraid it is also an extremely expensive thing for the true ancestors!"

Ye Tian said.

"Hahaha, what the Ten Thousand Dharma God General said is right!" Sun Heavenly Monarch nodded and said, "I have made up for the shortcomings of the Sun Dao and become the personal disciple of a certain True Ancestor, and that True Ancestor has spent a huge amount of money to send in a Sun Source Golden Tree that can allow me to transcend. Once I am gone, the True Ancestor will take me away. In the future, I will also be able to become a great True Ancestor. So, I'm not going to stay here anymore. Even if this place becomes a great universe or even a Dao realm in the future, it will not mean anything to me. "

"Congratulations to the Sun Celestial Monarch!"

"Congratulations to the Sun Celestial Monarch!"

"Congratulations to the Sun Celestial Monarch!"

A god general and the earth lord congratulated.

They were very envious of the Sun Heavenly Monarch, who could become a true ancestor's personal disciple, and they must value it very much, otherwise they would not pay a huge price to help him transcend.

Long Ze Shenjiang's face was very unsightly at this time, and he also made up for the defects of his own Dao, but unfortunately, he had already worshiped a true ancestor as an official disciple, but that true ancestor did not give him anything good.

Therefore, he was very envious and jealous.

"Phantom Feather Divine General, let's leave the universe and enter chaos together!"

The sun god will be in high spirits.

"Good!"

The Phantom Feather God nodded.

Immediately, the two tore through the cosmic barrier and rushed into the chaos.

As for the picture after that, the gods and generals in the universe can't see it.

In a short period of time, two transcendent beings appeared in the universe, and this was a prosperous age.

At this time, someone looked at Ye Tian.

From the ancestral tablet, I learned that Ye Tian is now a five-star god general, but a rebel, and it should be very easy to transcend.

But judging from the current situation, Ye Tian doesn't seem to want to be detached!

Time flies, tens of thousands of years pass.

It's a pity that during these tens of thousands of years, no one has been detached anymore, but there are three stars of gods who will try to detach, and as a result, they will fall under the catastrophe of the detached.

This three-star god general is the dragon god general!

Long Ze's talent is also very high, no one knew about it before, but now he is the third on the list of god generals, and after observing the detachment of the phantom feather god general, he has also done a lot of preciousness, but unfortunately it is still a little short, and finally fell under the catastrophe of the transcendent.

In fact, he can stay in the universe without detachment, and he can also ascend to the Heavenly Mandate Realm, or even the True Ancestor Realm, although it is more difficult, but at least it is not easy to fall.

It's just that he cares too much about fame, cares too much about detachment, and is even a little unconvinced, which eventually leads to his fall and death.

At this moment, there are no more living beings in the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe, and they have basically entered the new universe.

this day.

The fusion of the two universes reached the last moment, and I saw that the new universe collided at an extremely fast speed, engulfing the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe at once, completely fusing the two universes in a very domineering way.

And the cosmic origin of the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe was also forcibly swallowed by the new cosmic origin of the new, turning into the Great Cosmic Origin.

The metamorphosis begins!

If you are in the chaos, you can see that the new universe is expanding at an incredible speed, and countless chaotic energy is pouring into the universe, accelerating the birth of the great universe.

The volume of a large universe can far exceed that of an ordinary universe, basically 10,000 times the size, which refers to the ordinary universe after the unity of dimensions.

With every breath of time, the universe doubles!

Time passed slowly, and I don't know how long it had passed, and the entire universe had become a behemoth, standing in chaos.

After waiting for the great universe to be completely stabilized, one after another figures appeared in the chaotic area outside the great universe.

I saw one ancient figure after another, sending a famous god general and the Heavenly Monarch into the great universe.

After many gods and heavenly monarchs entered, the voice of the Red River True Ancestor came.

"Almost, there are so many people in the first batch, if you send more, the Great Universe Origin will also prevent you from entering!"

Red River True Ancestor Dao.

The other True Ancestors stopped, they knew that what the Red River True Ancestor said was very right, the Great Universe was different from the ordinary Universe, and the Chaos Beings were allowed to enter the Great Universe at a small cost, but if there were too many people, the Great Universe would also treat the Chaos Beings as moths and would wipe them out.

Therefore, they can't give people anymore, unless they wait for the great universe to evolve again, they can send people in again.

......

New Universe.

The dense Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs came in, and they quickly divided into camps.

All the gods and generals who are qualified to come in have a big background, otherwise they will not be able to get the quota, and there are more or less true ancestors behind them, and some of them are still Dao Ancestors.

The great universe is so big, and soon these powerhouses will be scattered and disappear without a trace.

At the same time, there was an astonishing change in the list of gods and generals on the ancestral monument.

Originally, Ye Tian was at the top of the list of divine generals, but now Ye Tian's name has disappeared.

No. 1 on the list of god generals: lifeless god generals, seven-star late god generals

No. 2 on the list of god generals: Sword Desolate God General, seven-star late God General

......

No. 1000 on the list of god generals: Lily of the valley god general, a six-star early god general

There are a total of 1,000 gods on the list of god generals, and only 1,000 god generals are recorded, in fact, there are so many god generals from the outside world who have entered the big universe, at least hundreds of thousands!

These are all the elites of the major forces of Chaos, and all of them are stronger than Ye Tian.

This is not to say that Ye Tian's potential is not good, but that the cultivation time is short and the resources are not enough.

In short, these gods will be placed in the chaos, they are all at the top Tianjiao level, and the ancestral monument is a real great opportunity, so they were sent here.

In addition to the list of god generals, a new list soon appeared on the ancestral monument.

Heavenly Monarch List!
